    % Initialize: all true (potential primes)
    InitialList = lists:duplicate(Max + 1, true),
    
    % Mark 0 and 1 as not prime (false)
    ListAfterBase = lists:replace(InitialList, 0, false),
    ListFinal = lists:replace(ListAfterBase, 1, false),
    
    % Sieving process
    sieve_recursive(2, ListFinal, Max).

sieve_recursive(P, CurrentList, Max) when P * P <= Max ->
    % Check if P is currently marked prime
    case lists:nth(P, CurrentList) of
        true ->
            % P is prime, mark all multiples starting from P*P
            NewList = mark_multiples(P, P * P, CurrentList, Max),
            % Move to next number
            sieve_recursive(P + 1, NewList, Max);
        false ->
            % P is not prime, move to next number
            sieve_recursive(P + 1, CurrentList, Max)
    end.

sieve_recursive(_, CurrentList, Max) ->
    CurrentList.

% Helper to mark multiples of P starting from Start
mark_multiples(P, Start, CurrentList, Max) ->
    % Recursively set list[Start], list[Start+P], ... to false
    mark_recursive(Start, P, CurrentList, Max).

mark_recursive(Current, P, CurrentList, Max) when Current <= Max ->
    % Set Current to false
    ListUpdated = lists:replace(CurrentList, Current, false),
    % Recurse to the next multiple
    mark_recursive(Current + P, P, ListUpdated, Max);
mark_recursive(_, _, CurrentList, _) ->
    CurrentList.

% Helper to find the smallest number K >= Start that satisfies the condition
% Condition: is_prime_list[K] = Required
find_target(Start, Required, IsPrimeList, Max) ->
    find_recursive(Start, Required, IsPrimeList, Max).

find_recursive(K, Required, IsPrimeList, Max) when K <= Max ->
    % Check the condition at K
    case lists:nth(K, IsPrimeList) of
        V when V == Required ->
            K; % Found the target
        _ ->
            % Keep searching
            find_recursive(K + 1, Required, IsPrimeList, Max)
    end.
find_recursive(_, _, _, _) ->
    error("Target not found within MAX_SIEVE").


solve(Nums) ->
    % Max input constraint is 10^5. Buffer for prime gaps.
    MaxSieve = 100500,
    
    % 1. Precalculate primality map
    IsPrimeList = sieve(MaxSieve),
    
    % 2. Calculate total cost by folding over the list with indices
    TotalCost = lists:foldl(
        fun(Cost, {Index, Value}) ->
            % Determine target based on index parity
            if Index rem 2 == 0 ->
                % Even index: Must be PRIME (Required = true)
                Required = true,
                Target = find_target(Value, Required, IsPrimeList, MaxSieve),
                NewCost = Cost + (Target - Value)
            ;
                % Odd index: Must be NON-PRIME (Required = false)
                Required = false,
                Target = find_target(Value, Required, IsPrimeList, MaxSieve),
                NewCost = Cost + (Target - Value)
            end
        end,
        0,
        lists:zip(lists:seq(0, length(Nums) - 1), Nums)
    ),
    TotalCost.

    MapAfterBase = maps:put(MapAfterBase, 1, false),
    
    % Iteratively mark multiples
    mark_multiples_map(MapAfterBase, 2, M).

mark_multiples_map(Map, P, M) when P*P <= M ->
    Map' = mark_multiples_step_map(Map, P, M),
    mark_multiples_map(Map', P + 1, M);

mark_multiples_step_map(Map, P, M) ->
    % Iterate i = P*P, P*P+P, ... M
    mark_step_recursive(Map, P * P, M, P).

mark_step_recursive(Map, CurrentIdx, M, P) when CurrentIdx <= M ->
    Map' = maps:put(Map, CurrentIdx, false),
    NewIdx = CurrentIdx + P,
    mark_step_recursive(Map', NewIdx, M, P);

mark_step_recursive(Map, _, _P) ->
    Map.

find_target(StartVal, Map, RequiredIsPrime, MaxSieve) ->
    % Search upwards from StartVal
    search_recursive(StartVal, Map, RequiredIsPrime, MaxSieve).

search_recursive(N, Map, RequiredIsPrime, MaxSieve) when N <= MaxSieve ->

    case Case of
        {ok, IsPrime} when IsPrime == RequiredIsPrime -> N;
        {ok, _} -> N + 1; % Mismatch, try next
        {error, _} -> N + 1 % Should not happen if N is within bounds of MaxSieve

search_recursive(_, _, _, MaxSieve) ->
    % Should not happen based on problem constraints, but indicates failure to find target
    MaxSieve + 1.

    case lists:member(I, [length(Nums) | 0]) of

        true ->

            NewTotalCost = TotalCost + CostIncrement,
